ogTitle: Cooloolabin vs Coolum Beach: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Cooloolabin and Coolum Beach.
heading: Cooloolabin vs Coolum Beach — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Cooloolabin, Queensland and Coolum Beach, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Coolum Beach has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Cooloolabin (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Cooloolabin or Coolum Beach safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Cooloolabin has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Coolum Beach scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Cooloolabin scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Coolum Beach scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Cooloolabin or Coolum Beach?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Coolum Beach has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
